kept.text:
$AUR: Leading Carrier Selects Aurora to Scale Autonomous Fleet to 500 Trucks

Aurora Innovation today announced a significant expansion of their strategic partnership with Hirschbach Motor Lines, including a plan for the carrier to own 500 Aurora Driver-powered trucks. The plan is reflected in a memorandum of understanding (MOU) outlining a path to scale with the final commercial terms and timing to be set in binding agreements expected to close later this year. The final deal will enable the carrier to aggressively scale its national network with 500 million driverless miles, while establishing a multi-year revenue stream for Aurora valued in the hundreds of millions of dollars.

https://t.co/QGiWevhcnF

kept.text:
🚨 Big news for $AUR 

Hirschbach Motor Lines, one of the largest refrigerated carriers in the U.S., has just signed an MOU to scale its autonomous fleet to 500 trucks powered by Aurora Driver. Deliveries begin in 2027, along with a multi-year revenue stream for Aurora valued in the hundreds of millions of dollars.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

kept.text:
🚨 Major catalyst for $AUR 

California DMV just approved self-driving truck regulations after years of debate.

The Golden State, one of the largest freight markets in the U.S. is now open for testing AND deployment of heavy-duty autonomous trucks.

Aurora Innovation is explicitly named as a winner in the coverage. After operating driverless in Texas and scaling fast, AUR can now expand into California.

Regulatory tailwind just got a lot stronger. 2026 just got more interesting.

Source: https://t.co/pAcWtFGyLC

kept.text:
Test bitti, ticari ölçeklenme başlıyor. ✅

Hirschbach ve $AUR bugün sektörün en büyük anlaşmalarından birini duyurdu. 

Hirschbach, 500 adet kamyon filosuna Aurora Driver teknolojisini entegre edecek ve 2027 yılında sürücüsüz ticari taşımalara başlayacak.

Bu sadece bir satış değil, sürekli ve yüksek marjlı bir teknoloji (DaaS) geliri.

500 adet, Hirschbach’in toplam filosunun yaklaşık %15-20’sine denk geliyor.

Diğer yandan da yüz milyonlarca dolar gelir şimdiden kesinleşmiş oldu. Kaldı ki sadece Hirschbach ile anlaşmadan gelecek gelirden bahsediyoruz.

Henüz Paccar, Volvo gibi şirketleri konuşmadık bile.

Bu anlaşma ile gelecek yıllarda 500M mil otonom sürüş gerçekleşmesi bekleniyor.

500M mil otonom sürüş verisi, yapay zekanın öğrenme hızını katlayarak rakiplerle aradaki moat etkisini devasa boyuta taşıyacak.

Her zaman inandık, inanmaya devam edeceğiz.

tweet.text:
🔔Ça fait plusieurs mois que je construis une vraie poche logistique, un secteur que je trouve encore largement sous-estimé… alors qu’il devient ultra tech.

$CYN $AUR $PACK $WATT

À la base, j’ai commencé avec $SYM , puis j’ai renforcé avec $AUR , $WATT $CYN et $PACK → ça me fait un bloc  cohérent autour de la logistique nouvelle génération.

J’avais déjà Symbiotic $SYM depuis longtemps, que j’ai renforcé aussi.

Mon idée est simple 👇  

➡️ énorme boom à venir sur les machines autonomes  

➡️ mais tout le monde ne pourra pas acheter du neuf (John Deere $DE , $CAT Caterpillar…)  ect 

➡️ donc énorme marché pour adapter l’existant avec des solutions autonomes

C’est là que $CYN (partenaire $NVDA ) prend tout son sens : équiper des machines déjà en place (levage, entrepôts…) à moindre coût.

En parallèle :  

- Aurora  $AUR → transport autonome  
- $PACK → emballage nouvelle génération  
-  $WATT → énergie sans fil  

Bref, toute la chaîne logistique devient intelligente.

Secteur oublié aujourd’hui… mais potentiellement explosif demain
